Uses of Class
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountingEntry

Packages that use AccountingEntry
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Contains core domain and transfer models.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Provides query-building support for Jasper reports.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons
Provides skeleton panel templates and scaffolding.
